{{Quote|I ''hate'' muja juice.|Sisseri Deo loses to Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy—and a glass of muja juice—during the Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|<ref name="YDR" />}}
'''Sisseri Deo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Firrerreo/Legends|Firrerreo]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Stationed at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] during the latter stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Deo participated in the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Sisseri Deo was taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] by a [[Jedi recruiter|member]] of the [[Acquisition Division/Legends|Acquisition Division]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the Jedi arts. At the [[Jedi academy|academy]] there, Deo studied in a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] until he [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduated]] from the academy and became eligible to become an apprentice to a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="YDR" />

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Deo was still stationed at the Temple and participated in the [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]]. Administrated by Master [[Ilena Xan]], Deo successfully won in the first and second rounds of the competition, defeating [[Forzi Ghul]], but was ultimately eliminated after losing to Padawan [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]] after she blinded him with a cup of [[muja juice]].<ref name="YDR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
